assertion: Cold water immersion at 14C increases plasma dopamine 250%
details: Sramek et al. 2000 measured plasma dopamine, NE, EP in volunteers at 14C, 20C, 32C water

assertion: Cold exposure dopamine response is reproducible and protocolized by Huberman
details: Huberman cold exposure protocol citing Sramek 2000 and other studies

assertion: Cold exposure systematic review of cognitive effects confirms catecholamine pathway
details: MDPI 2021 systematic review of cold exposure effects on cognition

assertion: 8-week exercise program increases D2/D3 BP_ND in methamphetamine users
details: Robertson et al. 2015 - exercise group showed significant increase in striatal D2/D3 vs education control

assertion: Intense exercise increases dopamine synthesis ~25% during session
details: Nature 2024 study - cycling at 70% VO2max increased DA synthesis

assertion: PET study of treadmill running showed no significant change in D2 binding post-exercise
details: Wang et al. 2000 - no acute change but chronic effects demonstrated separately

assertion: Seasonal variation in D2/D3 receptor availability of 25-30%
details: Sun et al. 2024 - winter vs summer D2/D3 binding potential difference

assertion: Vitamin D regulates tyrosine hydroxylase expression in dopamine neurons
details: Cui et al. 2015 - vitamin D directly modulates TH expression in mesencephalon

assertion: No evidence that short-term abstinence changes dopamine receptor density
details: The Scientist 2020 - neuroscientists interviewed state no evidence for receptor changes

assertion: Mayo Clinic states dopamine fasting is not a medically recognized practice
details: Mayo Clinic expert answers on dopamine fasting

assertion: One night total sleep deprivation reduces D2/D3 binding in human striatum
details: Volkow et al. 2012 - significant reduction in BP_ND after sleep deprivation

assertion: Sleep deprivation downregulates D2R specifically in mice
details: Lim et al. 2011 - D2 but not D1 downregulated by sleep deprivation

assertion: Systematic review finds moderate evidence for meditation-dopamine link
details: Baer et al. 2023 - 9 studies examined meditation and dopamine

assertion: Music triggers dopamine release in striatum during peak emotional moments
details: Salimpoor et al. 2011 - anticipation activates caudate, peak activates NAc

assertion: Goal pursuit with sub-goal scheduling sustains dopamine signaling
details: Neuroscience News 2025 - long-term goal pursuit maintains DA elevation

assertion: Huberman dopamine protocol describes cold exposure for dopamine management
details: Huberman Lab 2026 - dopamine and focus protocol
